name: Super Micro Computer, Inc.
description: Super Micro Computer, Inc. is a global leader in high-performance, high-efficiency server technology and innovation. The company develops and provides end-to-end green computing solutions for the enterprise, cloud, AI, and 5G telco/edge IT markets. Its products include complete servers, storage systems, workstations, blades, networking devices, server management software, and security software. Supermicro's advanced Server Building Block Solutions allow for a high degree of flexibility and customization, enabling the delivery of optimized solutions for diverse computational workloads while reducing environmental impact and total cost of ownership.
